name: GAP INC
business: The Gap, Inc. is a house of iconic American brands offering apparel, accessories, and personal care products for men, women, and children under the Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic, and Athleta brands. Gap Inc. is an omni-channel retailer, with sales to customers both in stores and online, through Company-operated and franchise stores, websites, and third-party arrangements.

exposures.sentence: The Gap, Inc. is a house of iconic American brands offering apparel, accessories, and personal care products for men, women, and children under the Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic, and Athleta brands.
Gap Inc. is an omni-channel retailer, with sales to customers both in stores and online, through Company-operated and franchise stores, websites, and third-party arrangements.

We continue to invest in our business and enhance the customer experience through ongoing supply chain, digital, marketing, and omni-channel initiatives, which include artificial intelligence ("AI") tools designed to create a seamless and personalized environment and our fashion and entertainment platform focused on enhancing brand engagement.
We are expanding our beauty and accessories assortment, increasing customer engagement through our revamped loyalty program, and advancing technology capabilities throughout our organization.

catalysts.event: Rebranded loyalty program as Encore in first quarter of fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of fiscal 2026, we rebranded our integrated loyalty program across the U.S. as Encore

catalysts.event: Board authorized a dividend of $0.175 per share for first quarter of fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Board authorized a dividend of $0.175 per share for the first quarter of fiscal 2026.
